board_csa_architect.notes: Aligns with unified routing architecture. No new schema required for L5-12. L6-18 needs tasks.metadata JSONB column check.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Sovereign classification keeps routing local. Human escalation strengthens governance posture. Forensic dossier improves audit trail.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: WORKER model handles classification within VRAM budget. No new model loading required. Pipeline execution reuses existing swap logic.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: start.sh simplifies ops. Tier detection is automatic. Container management is idempotent. Passes 3AM test.
